summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Digital Register HMS. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI excellent with Marathi-first design, all core workflows working including check-in/check-out, analytics, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: All 28 backend endpoints working (rooms, bookings, galla, analytics, whatsapp, formc)
22 rooms correctly seeded with Traffic Light color coding
Complete check-in/check-out workflow with room status transitions
Marathi-first UI with English language toggle
Owner analytics dashboard with occupancy/revenue data
JWT authentication with proper session management
